hero.headline: Not at fault in a car crash? Claimondo handles it.
hero.subheadline: Assessment. Lawyer. Settlement. All in one place. €0 for you — the other side pays.

independent.title: Independent assessors
independent.description: Partner experts committed only to your case.

regulation.title: Real settlement
regulation.description: Law firm represents you until full payout.

all_in_one.title: All in one place
all_in_one.description: Assessment, lawyer, settlement — one point of contact.

steps.heading: Here's how it works
steps.subheading: Three steps to a completed assessment.

step1.title: Capture the damage
step1.description: Upload photos or just dictate — your choice.

step2.title: AI first estimate
step2.description: Free, in seconds. Repair cost + replacement value.

step3.title: Assessor on site
step3.description: Appointment in your region, report within 48 hours.

dat_teaser.heading: Just a first estimate? Free in 2 minutes.
dat_teaser.description: Vehicle data and 2 photos — we estimate repair cost and replacement value. No account. No commitment.

polizei.question: Do I have to call the police?
polizei.teaser: If the other party is at fault and damage exceeds €1,500: yes. When exactly — read on.

werkstatt.question: Which workshop can I choose?
werkstatt.teaser: Free choice of workshop is legally protected — even against the insurer's wishes.

rechtsschutz.question: Do I need legal insurance?
rechtsschutz.teaser: For liability claims, no — the other side pays. We explain when it becomes relevant.

totalschaden.question: What is an economic total loss?
totalschaden.teaser: When does it get critical? And what are your options?

footer.tagline: Car damage management. Simple. Fair. Nationwide.

step0.heading: What happened?
step0.sub: Answer a few short questions about the damage — then we'll collect photos and the vehicle registration.

step1.heading: Accident details
step1.sub: Tell us what happened — either by voice or by typing.
step1.dsgvo_label: I consent to Claimondo processing my information for claim review. I can revoke this consent at any time.

fields.hergang_placeholder: For example: I was stopped at the traffic light, and the other driver rear-ended me.

errors.hergang_too_short: The description is too short — please add a few more details.
errors.unfall_datum_future: The accident date cannot be in the future.
errors.schuldfrage_required: Please choose who caused the accident.
errors.dsgvo_required: Without your consent we're unable to process the case.

gegner.label: The other driver
gegner.description: Ideal for Claimondo — we take over the full settlement.

ich.label: Myself
ich.description: In that case your own comprehensive (Kasko) insurance handles the claim — Claimondo isn't the right place for this.

teilschuld.label: Both — shared fault
teilschuld.description: We can still help with shared fault. The assessor will clarify the split.

unklar.label: Still unclear
unklar.description: No problem — we'll clarify the question of fault together with your lawyer.

voice.heading: Dictate what happened
voice.idle_hint: Tap the microphone and simply tell us what happened.
voice.idle_example: Example: "I was stopped at the red light at the intersection. A white BMW came from behind and hit my rear."
voice.preview_hint: Check the text — you can still edit it or record again.
voice.permission_denied: Without microphone access the voice input can't work. You can switch to "Type" at any time.

step2a.heading: Damage photos
step2a.sub: Click an area on the vehicle to upload matching photos. At least 3 photos are required.
step2a.dropzone_label: Drop photos here or click to browse
step2a.dropzone_hint: JPG, PNG or WEBP · max 10 MB

loading.heading: Analysing your damage …
loading.trust_note: We read your photos only once — the data stays with us and is not shared.

ergebnis.disclaimer: This is an AI-based preliminary estimate and does not replace an assessment. The binding value is determined on site by the assessor.
ergebnis.totalschaden_warning: Note: Repair cost could exceed replacement value — that would be an economic total loss. Your assessor will clarify this on site.

step2c.heading: Other driver details
step2c.sub: The more we know about the other driver, the faster settlement goes.
step2c.fahrerflucht_label: Hit and run — the other driver left the scene
step2c.auslandskennzeichen_label: Foreign plate — the other vehicle had a non-German licence plate
step2c.fahrerflucht_hint: The police case number is essential for further processing.
step2c.auslandskennzeichen_hint: Foreign plate — enter it as best you can.
step2c.gegner_versicherung_hint: Visible on the ZB1 / insurance card. Leave empty if unknown.
step2c.keine_zeugen: No witnesses recorded. Up to 5 allowed.

step3.heading: Vehicle registration (ZB1)
step3.sub: We need the vehicle data from your ZB1.
step3.scan_hint: We only need the front side (ZB1). Fields A, B, E and 2.1/2.2 must be clearly legible.
step3.manual_cta: I don't have my vehicle registration handy — enter manually
step3.ocr_low_confidence: Some fields were not recognised with confidence — please check and complete.

step4.heading: Create account
step4.sub: Finally, we need your login — then you can check on the case anytime.
step4.email_exists_hint: This email is already registered with Claimondo — sign in with your password and the case will be linked to your account.
step4.password_hint: At least 8 characters, one uppercase letter, one number.
step4.agb_label: I accept the Terms and Conditions.
step4.datenschutz_label: I have read the Privacy Policy and agree.
step4.makler_intro: Your case is supervised by {maklerName} — our partner broker who referred you to Claimondo.
step4.makler_explanation: Choose which information {maklerName} receives. You can revoke sharing at any time in your profile.
step4.consent_minimal_desc: {maklerName} will only see whether the case is open, completed or cancelled — no damage details.
step4.consent_full_desc: {maklerName} can see damage details, photos and the assessment status to support you better.

errors.email_invalid: That's not a valid email address.
errors.password_weak: The password is too weak — at least 8 characters, one uppercase letter, one number.
errors.password_mismatch: The two passwords do not match.
errors.agb_required: Without Terms consent we cannot create the case.
errors.datenschutz_required: Please agree to the Privacy Policy.

abort.heading: For self-caused accidents, we're not the right place
abort.explanation: If you caused the accident yourself, your own comprehensive (Kasko) insurance handles the claim. Claimondo specializes in liability cases where the other party — or their insurer — pays.
abort.tip_1: Report the damage to your comprehensive insurance as soon as possible.
abort.tip_2: Document the accident with photos and note every detail.
abort.tip_3: Get a cost estimate from a workshop you trust.
abort.hotline_hint: Not sure it really was your fault? Give us a call:

step_summary.heading: Hello {name}!
step_summary.sub: Please review and correct your details.
step_summary.datenschutz_text_suffix: and consent to the processing of my data.

step_gutachter.heading: Your personal appraiser
step_gutachter.sub: This expert will assess your damage.
step_gutachter.kontakt_hinweis: Will be in touch with you
step_gutachter.kein_gutachter: We are currently finding a suitable expert for you. You will receive a confirmation shortly.

step_sa.heading: Sign engagement
step_sa.sub: With your signature, you instruct Claimondo to handle your claim free of charge.
step_sa.summary_text: I instruct Claimondo GmbH to coordinate my vehicle damage claim. I incur no costs. The expert fees are assigned to the appraiser under the Sicherungsabtretung and are borne by the opposing insurance.
step_sa.checkbox_text: Yes, I want to use the free service. All costs are borne by the opposing insurance. I agree to the

volltext.s1_text: I hereby assign to Claimondo GmbH, by way of performance (erfüllungshalber), all claims for damages arising from the damage event described below to which I am entitled — in particular the claims for reimbursement of expert fees.
volltext.s1_li2: Claim for reimbursement of expert report fees
volltext.s1_li3: Ancillary costs (expense allowance, loss of use, rental car costs)
volltext.s1_li4: Claim for reimbursement of pre-litigation legal fees
volltext.s2_text: Engaging Claimondo GmbH incurs no costs for the client. Expert fees are covered directly by the opposing liability insurer under the Sicherungsabtretung. In the event of a reduction or rejection, Claimondo GmbH bears the financial risk.
volltext.s3_intro: The client authorises Claimondo GmbH to act on their behalf to:
volltext.s3_li1: engage a qualified automotive expert to prepare a damage report,
volltext.s3_li2: assert the assigned claims against the insurer out of court,
volltext.s3_li4: conduct all necessary correspondence with the opposing insurer.
volltext.s4_text: You have the right to withdraw from this contract within fourteen days without giving any reason. The withdrawal period is fourteen days from the date the contract is concluded.
volltext.s5_text: Your personal data is collected and processed exclusively for the purpose of claim settlement (Art. 6(1)(b) GDPR). Your data will only be shared with the engaged expert and the opposing insurer.
volltext.footer_note: Claimondo GmbH · The legally binding version is generated as part of the digital signature process.

step_account.heading: Done!
step_account.sub: Your case has been successfully created.
step_account.success_text: Your case has been successfully created! The expert has already been notified.

lexdrive.label: Your legal contact
lexdrive.hinweis: Our partner law firm. They will be in touch with you directly within the next business days.

step_account.fallback_email_hint: We have sent your access details to {email}.

metadata.title: About Claimondo — Digital Car Damage Claims from Cologne
metadata.description: Platform for car damage claim settlement, founded in Cologne in 2025. Founders: Nicolas Kitta (CEO) + Aaron Sprafke (COO). Certified partner network, no cost under §249 BGB (subject to acknowledgement by the opposing liability insurer).

hero.headline: Complete claim settlement —
hero.subline: We are the platform that gets injured parties what they are entitled to — not just what the insurance company is willing to approve.

definition.p1_continued: digital platform founded in Cologne for the complete settlement of motor vehicle liability claims. The registered office is at
definition.p2: Claimondo coordinates the entire claim settlement process: independent expert report by certified appraisers, legal enforcement through a partner law firm specialised in traffic law, and full payment of all entitlements under §249 BGB (German Civil Code on damage compensation) — repair costs, diminished value (Wertminderung), loss of use (Nutzungsausfall), rental car, and pain and suffering. The service is free of charge for injured parties who are not at fault (subject to acknowledgement by the opposing liability insurer).
definition.p3: The partner network consists of certified appraisers from the public DAT directory, with a focus on North Rhine-Westphalia and nationwide reachability. Appointments are typically available within 48 hours. The legal basis for the right to an independent appraiser is §249 BGB as well as established BGH case law (including VI ZR 65/18, VI ZR 174/24, VI ZR 119/04).

gutachter_finder.legal: Free for no-fault injured parties · §249 BGB

routing.heading: Are you currently at the accident scene?
routing.sub: We'll tailor the process to your situation.
routing.cta_vor_ort: Yes, at the scene — immediate intake

vor_ort_fotos.heading: Photos of the accident

vor_ort_kontakt.heading: How can we reach you?
vor_ort_kontakt.sub: We'll call you back within the next 5 minutes and dispatch an expert.

vor_ort_erfolg.heading: Immediate assistance is on the way
vor_ort_erfolg.sub: We'll call you back at {telefon} within the next 5 minutes.

wann.heading: When do you need the expert?
wann.sub: We'll tailor the process to your situation.
wann.sofort_sub: I'm at the accident scene — Express Assessment
wann.tage_sub: Schedule an appointment at your convenience

schaden.heading: What happened?
schaden.sub: So we can assign the right expert for your claim.
schaden.kz_label: License plate of the at-fault party
schaden.kz_unbekannt: License plate unknown / hit and run?

fahrzeug.heading: What type of vehicle?
fahrzeug.sub: We select an expert with the right specialization.

gps.heading: Experts near you

gps.hint: Only used for expert search · Data is not stored

detail.legal: Free for injured parties with no fault · €0 out of pocket

ansprueche.heading: Don't leave money on the table
ansprueche.sub: Insurers reduce payouts in <highlight_8von10>8 out of 10</highlight_8von10> cases. Those who settle without a lawyer often accept the first reduction — losing an average of over <highlight_3000>€3,000</highlight_3000>.
ansprueche.voll_li1: Independent appraiser documents all damage items
ansprueche.voll_li2: Specialist traffic-law lawyer files BGH-compliant within 30 days
ansprueche.voll_li3: We handle all communication on your behalf
ansprueche.voll_kostenlos: €0 for you — insurance pays lawyer + appraiser
ansprueche.beispiel_plus: Plus what would otherwise be reduced
ansprueche.beispiel_anwalt: Your lawyer demands the full amount

formular.heading: Your contact details
formular.agb_text: I authorise the arrangement of a KFZ-Sachverständiger and claim settlement. All costs are borne by the opposing insurance. I agree to the <link_agb>T&Cs</link_agb>, the <link_datenschutz>Privacy Policy</link_datenschutz>, and the <link_nutzung>Terms of Use</link_nutzung>.
formular.legal_volltext: I hereby engage Claimondo GmbH (i.Gr.), Hansaring 10, 50670 Köln, to arrange a certified KFZ-Sachverständiger for the assessment of the accident damage to my vehicle, and to handle the full claim settlement through a cooperating partner law firm. The costs for the expert and legal representation are borne by the at-fault party's liability insurer pursuant to §249 BGB. I incur no costs.
formular.hint_meldung: Your expert will be in touch within 30 minutes

erfolg.heading: Appointment confirmed!
erfolg.sub: {sv_vorname} will come to you at the chosen appointment.
erfolg.magic_link_sub: Click the link in the email sent to {email} — you will land directly in your portal with the created case, the appointment, and all documents.
erfolg.email_hint: You will receive a confirmation by email shortly. Your expert will contact you by phone in advance.
erfolg.zb1_sub: Take a photo of your vehicle registration document — we automatically read out the FIN, registered keeper, and model. Saves you typing later and immediately checks for any pre-existing damage.
erfolg.zb1_fin_hint: We are now checking in the background whether your vehicle has any pre-existing damage — if so, no problem, we factor that in automatically.

signatur.successBody: We will get back to you within 24 hours. Your documents have been securely transmitted.
signatur.abtretungstext:
ASSIGNMENT DECLARATION (Abtretungserklärung)

I, the undersigned, hereby assign in full to Claimondo GmbH all claims for damages to which I am entitled against the at-fault party and their liability insurer arising from the reported claim.

The assignment covers in particular:
• Claims for compensation of material damage
• Costs for expert reports (Sachverständigengutachten)
• All ancillary damage costs and legal enforcement costs

Claimondo GmbH is entitled to assert and collect the assigned claims in its own name. The assignment is made erfüllungshalber (in satisfaction of the obligation). In the event of non-recovery, the claims revert to the assignor.
signatur.vollmachttext:
POWER OF ATTORNEY & LEGAL MANDATE (Vollmacht & Anwaltsmandat)

I, the undersigned, hereby grant Claimondo GmbH and the lawyers instructed by them full power of attorney to represent me in all matters relating to the reported claim.

The power of attorney covers in particular:
• Out-of-court enforcement of all claims against at-fault parties and insurers
• Judicial enforcement in one's own name and on behalf of others
• Conclusion of settlements and receipt of payments
• Engagement of expert appraisers and other specialists
• Initiation and conduct of enforcement proceedings

This power of attorney remains in effect until expressly revoked in writing.

zb1.errorExpiredBody: This upload link is no longer valid. Please contact your designated contact person for a new link.
zb1.errorAlreadyBody: We have already received your vehicle registration document. If you would like to send a new photo, please contact your designated contact person.
zb1.errorInvalidBody: This upload link is invalid. Please check the URL or contact your designated contact person.
zb1.instructions: Please photograph your vehicle registration document (Zulassungsbescheinigung Teil I, front side). We will read the data automatically.
zb1.tip1: All 4 corners of the document visible
zb1.tip4: No reflective glare on the laminate
zb1.successBody: Your vehicle registration has been received. Your contact person will be in touch shortly.
zb1.closeHint: You can close this page now.
zb1.errorTip: Tip: good lighting, all 4 corners visible, image in focus — please try again.
zb1.privacyNote: Your data is transmitted in encrypted form and used solely for processing your claim.

dokumente.errorExpiredBody: This upload link is no longer valid. Please contact your case handler to request a new link.
dokumente.errorInvalidBody: This upload link is invalid. Please check the URL or contact your case handler.
dokumente.instructions: Please upload the following documents. You can do this one at a time — each document is saved immediately.
dokumente.allDoneBody: All documents have been received. Your contact will be in touch shortly.
dokumente.closeHint: You can close this page now.
dokumente.privacyNote: Your data is transmitted securely and used solely for processing your claim.

hints.fahrzeugschein: Vehicle registration certificate Part I (front side). All 4 corners visible, good lighting, sharp.
hints.polizeibericht: The slip you received from the police after the accident.
hints.unfallfotos: Photos of the vehicle damage — multiple angles welcome (front, rear, sides, detail). The more photos, the better the damage assessment.
hints.sonstiges: Any document related to the case — e.g. purchase contract, invoice, photo.
hints.sachschaden_foto: Photos of the damaged item — multiple angles, good lighting.
hints.sachschaden_rechnung: Repair invoice or cost estimate for the damaged item.
hints.aerztliches_attest: Medical certificate documenting your injuries — front and back if available.
hints.diagnosebericht: Medical findings report or discharge summary — upload all pages.
hints.zeugenaussage: Written witness statement or business card / note with contact details.
